description_long: This house features a simple, rectangular structure with a flat, light wood-textured exterior. The front facade is defined by a central dark brown door flanked by two large, blue-framed windows, giving it a balanced and approachable appearance. The left side of the house has a single blue-framed window near the front, while the right and rear sides are unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist design. The roof is flat and matches the wood grain pattern of the walls, contributing to a modern, utilitarian aesthetic. The windows are large and likely allow ample natural light into the interior. The overall design is functional and straightforward, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A rectangular, flat-roofed house with a wood-textured exterior, blue-framed windows, and a central brown door. The design is minimalist and modern, with large windows on the front and left sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing a central brown door and two large blue-framed windows symmetrically placed on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view with a single blue-framed window near the front; the rest of the wall is plain.
description_view_2: Rear view with no windows or doors, displaying a plain wood-textured wall.
description_view_3: Right side view, completely plain with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on front and left sides
attribute_entryway_design: Central plain brown door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements
